name: Ancient grain cake
summary: A hypothetical early pancake: coarse ground grain mixed with water and cooked on hot stone or clay.
alt_text: Small coarse grain cakes cooking on a heated stone beside a fire.

name: Crêpe
summary: A very thin wheat batter pancake used for sweet or savory fillings.
alt_text: A thin crêpe folded around fruit and cream on a plate.

name: Dosa
summary: A fermented rice-and-lentil pancake, often thin and crisp, usually served with chutney and sambar.
alt_text: Golden dosa folded beside small bowls of chutney and sambar.

name: Injera
summary: A large fermented teff pancake that functions as bread, plate, and utensil.
alt_text: Large round injera topped with colorful stews for a shared meal.

name: Blini
summary: Thin or small pancakes with strong festival associations, especially Maslenitsa.
alt_text: Stack of blini with sour cream and herbs.

name: Buttermilk pancake
summary: A thick, fluffy, chemically leavened breakfast pancake, often served sweet.
alt_text: Stack of fluffy pancakes with syrup and butter.

name: Okonomiyaki
summary: A savory griddled pancake built from batter, cabbage, toppings, and sauce.
alt_text: Okonomiyaki topped with sauce, mayonnaise, seaweed, and bonito flakes.

name: Scallion pancake
summary: A layered, griddled wheat flatbread that occupies the contested pancake-flatbread border.
alt_text: Crisp scallion pancake cut into wedges.

name: Jeon
summary: A family of savory pan-fried pancakes often served communally or on holidays.
alt_text: Assorted Korean jeon arranged on a serving platter.

name: Baghrir
summary: A semolina pancake known for its honeycomb-like surface of tiny holes.
alt_text: Honeycomb-textured baghrir drizzled with honey.

name: Arepa
summary: A thick corn cake that may be split and filled; a contested but useful pancake-relative.
alt_text: Arepa split open and filled with cheese and shredded meat.

name: Hoe cake
summary: A cornmeal griddle cake with deep North American roots.
alt_text: Cornmeal cakes browning on a cast-iron griddle.

name: Latke
summary: A fried potato pancake with strong holiday associations.
alt_text: Crisp potato latkes served with applesauce and sour cream.

name: Bánh xèo
summary: A crisp savory rice pancake folded around herbs, sprouts, and fillings.
alt_text: Crisp yellow bánh xèo folded around herbs and bean sprouts.

name: Hopper
summary: A bowl-shaped fermented rice pancake, often cooked in a special pan.
alt_text: Sri Lankan hopper with crisp edges and an egg in the center.

name: Poffertjes
summary: Small fluffy pancakes cooked in a special dimpled pan, usually served sweet.
alt_text: Miniature poffertjes dusted with powdered sugar.

name: Soufflé pancake
summary: A tall aerated pancake that pushes the pancake category toward cake and foam technology.
alt_text: Tall soufflé pancakes stacked with cream and fruit.

name: Dutch baby
summary: An oven-puffed pancake that challenges the griddle requirement.
alt_text: Large puffed Dutch baby pancake in a cast-iron skillet.

name: Yorkshire pudding
summary: A savory oven-puffed batter food; included as a deliberately unhinged pancake-borderline case.
alt_text: Golden Yorkshire puddings risen in a hot pan.

name: Cachapa
summary: A thick sweet corn griddle pancake traditionally folded over fresh cheese.
alt_text: A golden corn cachapa oozing melted cheese on a plate.

name: Pannenkoek
summary: A large thin pancake often baked with whole slices of bacon or apples directly into the batter.
alt_text: A wide dinner-plate sized pannenkoek loaded with crispy bacon and syrup.

name: Kaiserschmarrn
summary: A shredded sweet pancake caramelized in a pan and served with fruit compotes.
alt_text: A mound of fluffy torn pancake pieces dusted with powdered sugar.

name: Jianbing
summary: A thin street food crepe cooked on a round griddle and folded around a crisp cracker and sauces.
alt_text: A jianbing being folded on a round flat top grill.

name: Roti canai
summary: A flaky flatbread-adjacent pancake made by spinning and stretching dough until translucent.
alt_text: A flaky golden roti canai torn open beside a bowl of curry.

name: Pancake on a stick
summary: A breakfast sausage cloaked in thick pancake batter and deep fried.
alt_text: A golden-brown pancake on a stick with a bite revealing sausage.

name: Uttapam
summary: A thick fermented pancake topped with vegetables and cooked on a griddle.
alt_text: Vegetable-topped uttapam cooking on a hot griddle.

name: Adai
summary: A hearty savory pancake made from coarsely ground legumes and rice.
alt_text: Golden adai served with chutney.

name: Apam balik
summary: A folded sweet pancake filled with peanuts, sugar, and corn.
alt_text: Folded apam balik with visible peanut filling.

name: Martabak manis
summary: A thick sweet pancake folded around chocolate, nuts, or cheese.
alt_text: Thick martabak manis folded over sweet fillings.

name: Martabak telur
summary: A savory stuffed griddled pancake filled with eggs and minced meat.
alt_text: Savory martabak telur sliced into squares.

name: Msemen
summary: A laminated griddled flatbread occupying the pancake-flatbread borderlands.
alt_text: Square folded msemen served with tea.

name: Frybread
summary: A fried flatbread with contested pancake ancestry.
alt_text: Round frybread puffed and golden from hot oil.

name: Bannock
summary: A simple flatbread cooked on a griddle, stone, or pan.
alt_text: Rustic bannock beside a campfire.

name: Tortilla
summary: A foundational flatbread often proposed as a pancake cousin.
alt_text: Fresh tortillas stacked in a cloth-lined basket.

name: Pita
summary: A leavened flatbread with a pocket structure.
alt_text: Pita bread split open to reveal its pocket.

name: Naan
summary: A leavened flatbread baked against the wall of a tandoor.
alt_text: Fresh naan blistered from a clay oven.

name: Funnel cake
summary: A poured batter fried into a tangled lattice.
alt_text: Funnel cake dusted with powdered sugar at a fair.

name: Waffle
summary: A batter-based relative that diverged through specialized cookware.
alt_text: Belgian waffle with deep pockets and berries.

name: Takoyaki
summary: A spherical batter food representing an extreme pancake-adjacent lineage.
alt_text: Takoyaki balls topped with sauce and bonito flakes.
